patterns_observed: Instrumenting planning rationales allows for implicit usage tracking without adding complexity to the strategic plan schema.
Sidecar metadata stores (stats.json) are preferable to modifying source markdown files to maintain repository cleanliness.
Archival is a lower-risk strategy than deletion for autonomous agents, preventing irreversible 'intelligence loss' due to threshold misconfigurations.
proposals: Consider adding a 'Skill Consolidation' node that uses the LLM to merge multiple overlapping theorems into a single generalized one.
Implement a 'Decay Function' for skill importance, where older skills require higher performance to stay out of the archive.
